description: v1.1 home directory files and directories

textFiles.welcome.txt:
GregOS 1.1 — Guest Terminal

Directories:
  games/     Interactive projects (cd games, then open)
  drafts/    Work in progress experiments

Useful commands:
  help       List available commands
  man <cmd>  Read the manual for a command
  cat <file> Read a file
  ls         List files and directories
  cd <dir>   Change directory
  open       Launch current folder in browser

Try: man gregos

textFiles.about.txt:
Gregory Alan
Developer. Builds games, tools, and systems.

This machine runs GregOS — a custom kernel and terminal.
Projects live in games/ and drafts/. Everything here is
either shipped or half-finished. Explore at your own pace.

source: github.com/GregoryAlan/GregoryAlan.com
